layoutPatterns.philosophy: Content-first. Generous whitespace. Maximum 1200px content width. Mobile-first responsive.

sm.label: Mobile
sm.notes: Primary mobile breakpoint. All cards full-width.

landing.description: Marketing landing page. Full-width hero, centered content sections.

dashboard.description: User dashboard. Stats bar + booking cards grid.

bookingDetail.description: Single booking view. Header + 2-column info/results layout.

submitBooking.description: Booking creation form. Single centered column.

admin.description: Admin dashboard. Table-heavy layout with stats.

animationGuidelines.philosophy: Animation should feel invisible — it guides, never distracts. Duration under 400ms for interactions. Ease-out for entrances, ease-in for exits.
principles: Respond instantly: 50-100ms for micro-feedback (button press, toggle)
Transitions are functional: 200-300ms for state changes (tab switch, form error)
Entrances welcome: 300-500ms for content appearing (page load, modal open)
Exits are swift: 150-200ms for content leaving (modal close, toast dismiss)
Direction matters: content enters from where user expects it
Respect motion preferences: disable all animation for prefers-reduced-motion

inputFocus.description: Border turns green, focus ring appears

priceUpdate.description: New price number counts up/down, color flashes green/red

savingsBadgePulse.description: Gentle glow pulse when new savings found

uiComponents.applies: Borders, icons, focus indicators against bg

verifiedPairs.status: FAIL for text, OK for decorative

colorContrast.warningNote: neutral-500 (#ADB5BD) on white fails AA for text. Use neutral-600 (#868E96) minimum for readable text. neutral-500 is only for decorative/disabled elements.

keyboard.focusVisible: 2px solid green-500 outline, 2px offset. Never remove.
keyboard.escapeClose: Modals, dropdowns, tooltips close on Escape
keyboard.enterActivate: Buttons and links activate on Enter
keyboard.spaceActivate: Buttons, checkboxes, switches activate on Space
keyboard.arrowNavigation: Within tab bars, radio groups, dropdowns
keyboard.skipLink: First focusable element: 'Skip to main content'

liveRegions.toasts: aria-live='assertive' for error toasts, 'polite' for success
liveRegions.loadingStates: aria-busy='true' while loading, aria-live='polite' for completion

screenReader.images: All meaningful images have alt text. Decorative images have alt='' and role='presentation'.
screenReader.headingHierarchy: Strict h1 → h2 → h3 order. One h1 per page.
screenReader.priceAnnouncement: Screen readers announce 'Preco atual: R$ 2.489, economia de R$ 932' — not just the number

motion.prefersReducedMotion: All animations disabled. Transitions set to 0.01ms. No parallax, no auto-play.
motion.noFlashing: Nothing flashes more than 3 times per second
motion.noAutoScroll: User controls scrolling. No auto-scroll except explicit navigation.
motion.loadingTimeout: If loading >10 seconds, show message with option to cancel

forms.labels: Every input has a visible label. Never placeholder-only.
forms.errors: Error messages appear below field with error icon. Both visual (red) and text.
forms.requiredFields: Marked with * and aria-required='true'. Legend at top of form.
forms.autocomplete: Use appropriate autocomplete attributes for personal data fields.
forms.inputPurpose: Date fields use type='date', email uses type='email', etc.
forms.errorSummary: On submit failure, focus moves to first error. Summary at top of form.

touchTargets.spacing: At least 8px between adjacent touch targets
touchTargets.exception: Inline links in text can be smaller if text is large enough

colorIndependence.rule: Never use color alone to convey information
examples: Price drop: green color + down arrow icon + text 'Economia de R$X'
Price increase: red color + up arrow icon + text '+R$X'
Error state: red border + error icon + error message text
Status: colored dot + text label always present

brandVoice.tone: Confident, clean, trustworthy. Like a premium concierge, not a salesperson.

copyGuidelines.headings: Short. Declarative. No exclamation marks. 'Encontre o melhor preco.' not 'ECONOMIZE JA!!!'
copyGuidelines.body: Clear, warm, professional. Brazilian Portuguese. Formal 'voce' (not 'tu').
copyGuidelines.numbers: Always formatted: R$ 2.489,00 — use Brazilian formatting with dots and commas.
copyGuidelines.empty states: Encouraging, not blaming. 'Nenhuma reserva ainda. Adicione sua primeira reserva para comecar a monitorar.'
copyGuidelines.errors: Specific and helpful. 'Data de checkout deve ser posterior ao checkin.' not 'Erro no formulario.'
